ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Recount
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In this dramatization of the 2000 presidential election, Al Gore concedes the presidency to George W. Bush, but recants when he learns of irregularities in the Florida vote count. Democratic strategists Ron Klain (Kevin Spacey) and Michael Whouley (Denis Leary) race to Florida to uncover the truth, as do Republicans under James Baker (Tom Wilkinson). Between faulty voting equipment and the vagaries of Florida's Secretary of State Katherine Harris (Laura Dern), a 36-day stalemate ensues.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: All the Way

Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: The Death Consequence
HBO.West.us2.description: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Rock: Kill the Messenger
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic performs at South Africa's Carnival City Casino, the Apollo Theatre in New York and the Carling Apollo Hammersmith in London.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Clear History
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Coastal Elites
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five characters in isolation react with frustration, hilarity and introspection as they grapple with politics, culture, and the pandemic.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marcella Arguello: B..., Grow Up!
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Marcella's stand-up comedy special at the Roulette Intermedium in Brooklyn, N.Y.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

Maybe his superhero sidekick Robin (Michael Cera) and loyal butler Alfred (Ralph Fiennes) can show him a thing or two.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. AMC.HD.us2.title: The Social Network
AMC.HD.us2.description: In 2003, Harvard undergrad and computer genius Mark Zuckerberg (Jesse Eisenberg) begins work on a new concept that eventually turns into the global social network known as Facebook. Six years later, he is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but Zuckerberg finds that his unprecedented success leads to both personal and legal complications when he ends up on the receiving end of two lawsuits, one involving his former friend (Andrew Garfield). Based on the book "The Accidental Billionaires.".

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Thirteen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Men in Black
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges become doctors at a large hospital, where they disrupt patients and staff alike.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges

AMC.HD.us2.title: WarGames
AMC.HD.us2.description: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
AMC.HD.us2.description: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part III
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this final chapter, Marty McFly (Michael J. Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Doc from a local schoolmarm, and repair the DeLorean -- all while avoiding a posse of gunslingers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this 1980s sci-fi classic, small-town California teen Marty McFly is thrown back into the '50s when an experiment by his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown goes awry. Traveling through time in a modified DeLorean car, Marty encounters young versions of his parents, and must make sure that they fall in love, or he'll cease to exist. Even more dauntingly, Marty has to return to his own time and save the life of Doc Brown.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this zany sequel, time-traveling duo Marty McFly and Dr. Emmett Brown return from saving Marty's future son from disaster, only to discover their own time transformed. In this nightmarish version of Hill Valley, Marty's father has been murdered and Biff Tannen, Marty's nemesis, has profited. After uncovering the secret to Biff's success -- a sports almanac from the future -- Marty and the Doc embark on a quest to repair the space-time continuum.

Although Kaffee is known for seeking plea bargains, a fellow lawyer, Lt. Cdr. JoAnne Galloway (Demi Moore), convinces him that the accused marines were most likely carrying out an order from a commanding officer. Kaffee takes a risk by calling Col. Nathan R. Jessep (Jack Nicholson) to the stand in an effort to uncover the conspiracy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Moneyball
AMC.HD.us2.description: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt), general manager of the Oakland A's, one day has an epiphany: Baseball's conventional wisdom is all wrong. Faced with a tight budget, Beane must reinvent his team by outsmarting the richer ball clubs. Joining forces with Ivy League graduate Peter Brand (Jonah Hill), Beane prepares to challenge old-school traditions. He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have labeled as flawed, but have game-winning potential. Based on the book by Michael Lewis.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Eleven
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Following three rules: Don't hurt anybody, don't steal from anyone who doesn't deserve it, and play the game like you've got nothing to lose. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Necesito amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aurora está obsesionada con encontrar al hombre perfecto para casarse. Conoce a Damián, un dentista, y le da a entender a todos que son novios. Luego, se ve enredada en un juego amoroso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo amo con todo mi odio; Amor de estudiante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Salemni ha intentado matar al padre de su hija porque no se ocupa de ella ni le pasa la manutención. Además, Sarah descubre a su hija con un profesor en un hotel y la obliga a casarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enferma por mentira; Infarto sexual
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con mentiras, Oscar ha recaudado más dinero del necesario para supuestamente ayudar a la hermana de Arianna. David cree que su hermana y su madrastra mataron del susto a su padre por dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo por mis quince
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alba perdió a su bebé en un terremoto, pero logró rehacer su vida y tuvo una segunda hija, Ximena. Una adolescente rebelde que simula su propio secuestro porque sus padres le negaron una fiesta de 15 años.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hasta mañana, mi amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de bodas de una pareja es arruinado cuando el novio sufre un grave accidente que lo deja paralítico. La vida de los dos se vuelve un infierno, pero el destino les tiene una sorpresa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego logra rescatar a Circe de las garras de Joselito, la lleva a donde él vive y cura sus heridas. La Mami Chula aprovecha la ocasión para recordarle que él siempre será de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mucha risa y pocos premios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los hermanos Luis y Leobardo llegan ilusionados con ganar el automóvil, no será fácil. Patricia y su cuñado Misael quieren ganar el dinero en efectivo, pero una vez más, la jaula es implacable.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en el toilet
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abril está embarazada y tiene un encuentro con Geraldine, la amante de su esposo. Luego, sufre en el baño un aborto espontáneo, el feto cae al suelo y Geraldine, en la confusión, lo bota en el inodoro y tira la cadena.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bondad y temor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El padre Gustavo sufre un tormento por la confesión de una feligresa que lo lleva a una encrucijada entre la complicidad, el deber y la fe. Si habla, traicionará a su propia madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa denuncia que su bebé está hospitalizado y corre peligro porque se le adelantó el parto tras ser agredida por su suegra Lilia, quien la acusa de mentir sobre la paternidad de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sea infiel, use condón; Escándalo, basura y anarquía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para demostrar que cualquier persona puede ser infiel, Melisa contrata a Victoria. Kalan, que vive como un vagabundo, le regala a su amigo Diego un local en Nueva York a cambio de dejarlo dormir atrás.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Con glory se vive mejor; La promesa de Alexander
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ella quiere que su pareja deje de consumir "Morning glory". Él alega que la sustancia mejora su productividad. Alexander perdió la custodia de su hijo al entrar en prisión y el menor se suicidó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por cobarde perdí a mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lulú quiere dejar a Lisandro tras 18 años de maltrato y recuperar la relación con sus cuatro hijos, quienes abandonaron el hogar porque también fueron agredidos por su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juego de seducción
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de la visita de la tía del verdadero Emiliano Guevara, Isabel busca a Diego y, cuando entra a su habitación, se lleva la gran sorpresa de su vida. Circe tiende una trampa a Augusto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si cruzas la frontera te mato; Piratería en la industria musical
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Fabio tiene una finca en la frontera con México y mata a los indocumentados que cruzan por ahí. Además, Vicente es un músico que se quedó rezagado con la tecnología, y su hija se aprovecha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Reparadora sexual; Justicia para Lupita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Issis contrata albañiles, carpinteros y electricistas y les paga con sexo. Su hija la imita en la escuela. Además, a Ivone y a Antonio les robaron a su bebé recién nacida, pero ella no lo ha superado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por el amor de una familia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Leonor se siente sola porque su hijo solo la busca cuando necesita dinero y un día se encariña con tres niños huérfanos. Pero ellos caen en manos de su padrastro que es un criminal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Obligado por las circunstancias, un padre se tiene que separar de su hijo. Además, Andrea demanda a los padres de la niña que alquiló y exige que le devuelvan el dinero del depósito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lola esteroides; Un cuadro doloroso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lola obliga a su esposo Rocco a inyectarse esteroides para tener mejor desempeño físico y sexual. Además, Ángela descubrió que una alumna está siendo abusada por un familiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El amor no tiene edad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Clara es una mujer adulta que nunca se casó y vive para cuidar a su padre. Con la ayuda de su sobrina, ella tiene la oportunidad de descubrir lo que es el amor. Pero su felicidad durará poco.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Madre sólo hay una
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvana tiene un hijo y su madre decide criarlo como si fuese suyo. Durante años, todos viven en la mentira, hasta que la verdad sale a la luz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dos amores, dos milagros
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una pareja se entera que va a tener gemelas, pero el día del parto solo recibe a una de las niñas. El médico les informa que una de las bebés no sobrevivió. Pero la madre sospecha que no fue así.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muxhe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Refugio tiene disforia de género y es víctima de abuso en la escuela, incluso su propio padre lo llama "rarito", pero ella defiende el derecho del niño de recibir un trato digno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No mereces mi amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Beto se divierte al seducir a María, la empleada doméstica de su casa, quien termina embarazada. Ahora, él quiere librarse del problema a toda costa, ella decide no quedarse de brazos cruzados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dulce y Édgar hacen lo posible para ganar una sala de entretenimiento. Fernando y Rodrigo, amigos y colegas de baile, se mueven al son de las preguntas y retos, un mal paso podría ser letal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enfrentar el miedo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Brenda encara una tarea pendiente y su mayor miedo al recibir esa visita inesperada, pero no es la primera vez, ella tiene una segunda oportunidad para extender su tiempo de vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Usa su embarazo para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel está dispuesto a confesarle a su esposa, embarazada, que le fue infiel. No soporta el chantaje económico de Vianey, con quien también espera un bebé tras una noche de copas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvando al bastardo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos tiene dos hijos, uno con su esposa y otro con su amante, el segundo tiene leucemia y necesita un trasplante urgente de su hermano que es compatible, pero la madre no lo autoriza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe mueve sus fichas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula planea matar dos pájaros de un solo tiro. Logra que Joselito y su traidor, Augusto, vayan a buscarla y allí espera eliminarlos. Diego sufre por Isabel.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Burgos CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Real Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral para instalarse cerca del área rival. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y eficacia; si compite los rechaces y la estrategia, podrá rascar en un duelo de márgenes estrechos.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Málaga CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Luka Modric
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Estrela Amadora – Sporting Lissabon (29. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Sparta Rotterdam – PSV Eindhoven (30. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Internacional – Gremio (11. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: As UFC returns to the Meta APEX to begin the second quarter on Saturday, April 5, it does so with a Fight Night event headlined by a lightweight matchup carrying a high potential for fireworks as Renato Moicano squares off with Chris “The Problem” Duncan. Currently stationed at No. 10 in the rankings, Moicano has crafted a reputation as an all-action fighter and notoriously tough out for anyone in the division.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC 327: Procházka vs. Ulberg - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When UFC returns to Miami in April, it will do so with a numbered event headlined by a pair of championship bouts as UFC 327 takes place on Saturday, April 12 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida. The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 805 - UFC Connected "Unbreakable: Austin Vanderford x Paige VanZant, Fighter Focus: Jake Matthews, Day One: Brandon Royval, Locked In: Oban Elliott
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Austin Vanderford opens up about the unbreakable bond with his wife and combat sports veteran Paige VanZant, has prepared him for the bright lights of the Octagon. "The Celtic Kid" Jake Matthews details how his newfound faith has elevated his career to new heights. Number one flyweight contender Brandon Royval looks back on his UFC debut in Day One. UFC welterweight “The Welsh Gangster” Oban Elliott reveals what keeps him Locked in.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: New York City's Madison Square Garden has hosted some of the best fights in UFC history. On this episode of UFC Unleashed, we've got a collection of bouts coming from the Mecca of combat sports. Featuring Zhang Weili, Georges St-Pierre, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When UFC returns to Miami in April, it will do so with a numbered event headlined by a pair of championship bouts as UFC 327 takes place on Saturday, April 12 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida. The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1002: Usman vs. Covington 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 268 was headlined by the heated rematch between welterweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and Colby “Chaos” Covington. Relive their incredible battle with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Barcelona club captain and Spanish national team legend Gerard Pique has called time on his career. This is a whirlwind look back at the illustrious career of a man who has won everything the game has to offer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moicano vs. Duncan - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: As UFC returns to the Meta APEX to begin the second quarter on Saturday, April 5, it does so with a Fight Night event headlined by a lightweight matchup carrying a high potential for fireworks as Renato Moicano squares off with Chris “The Problem” Duncan. Currently stationed at No. 10 in the rankings, Moicano has crafted a reputation as an all-action fighter and notoriously tough out for anyone in the division.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1002: Usman vs. Covington 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 268 was headlined by the heated rematch between welterweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and Colby “Chaos” Covington. Relive their incredible battle with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1002 - Ultimate Knockouts "Welterweights
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts brings you a collection of the best welterweight KOs.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 320: Ankalaev vs Pereira
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 320 Countdown previews two title fights. In the main event, Magomed Ankalaev battles Alex Pereira in a rematch for the light heavyweight crown. In the co-main event, Merab Dvalishvili puts his bantamweight belt on the line against Cory Sandhagen

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Barcelona club captain and Spanish national team legend Gerard Pique has called time on his career. This is a whirlwind look back at the illustrious career of a man who has won everything the game has to offer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 327: Procházka vs. Ulberg - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When UFC returns to Miami in April, it will do so with a numbered event headlined by a pair of championship bouts as UFC 327 takes place on Saturday, April 12 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida. The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Barcelona club captain and Spanish national team legend Gerard Pique has called time on his career. This is a whirlwind look back at the illustrious career of a man who has won everything the game has to offer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moicano vs. Duncan - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: As UFC returns to the Meta APEX to begin the second quarter on Saturday, April 5, it does so with a Fight Night event headlined by a lightweight matchup carrying a high potential for fireworks as Renato Moicano squares off with Chris “The Problem” Duncan. Currently stationed at No. 10 in the rankings, Moicano has crafted a reputation as an all-action fighter and notoriously tough out for anyone in the division.
